case_title: JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS, LLC VS. JOSE DIAZ ET AL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DIAZ, JOSE $5,287.95 PRINCIPAL, $323.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,611.45, SEE SCANNED DOC
